name: Transformer
shortDescription: A transformer is a passive device that transfers electrical energy between two or more circuits through electromagnetic induction.
whatIsIt: A transformer is a passive device that transfers electrical energy between two or more circuits through electromagnetic induction. It consists of coupled coils sharing a magnetic core.
whyExists: Transformers change voltage and current levels efficiently, provide isolation, and match impedances in Alternating Current (AC) systems.
whereUsed: Transformers are everywhere in power grids, chargers, audio equipment, and isolation circuits.
